rules.rule_text:
title: WMIC Suspicious Commands
id: 9c3367de-94fd-4a46-bc9f-d2943bd32025
status: experimental
description: Detects suspicious parent-child relationships with the wmiprvse command.
  Inspired by the 2022 Red Canary Threat Detection report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/03
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \wmiprvse.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \rundll32.exe
    - \msbuild.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \cmd.exe
    - \mshta.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
